calendar.matters:
AMENDED ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Sep-25-2008 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Aug-05-2008 Amended
MINI MINUTES: August 5, 2008

This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name of an Adult and two Minors.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, 3689.

Petitioner Janice Marie McMcEldry was present in pro per for her own name change, and as Guardian ad litem for the minors Joliyatt Lousie McClelland and Janis Marie McEldry Rochan.
Petitioner was placed under oath and examined.
Proof of Publication in file.

Petitioner did not notify the father of the minor Janice Marie McEldry Rochan of the proposed name change. Additionally, a clerical error in all three Proofs of Publication precludes the Court from proceeding with the three name changes.

Petitioner is directed to seek assistance from the Access Center. Accordingly, matter is taken OFF CALENDAR.
